description: Acoustic sensors detect a gunshot in a public park. An operator must verify the threat and dispatch police.

nodes.task_description: Receive a gunshot detection alert from 'Washington Park'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the high-priority acoustic alert.

nodes.task_description: Automatically pivot the nearest PTZ camera to the alert's location to get visual confirmation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent uses the tool to direct a camera to the location.

nodes.task_description: After visually confirming a potential active shooter situation, dispatch all available police units to the location with high priority.

expected_outcome.value: Agent dispatches police with critical information.
